name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: Decatur, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns at 3454 Memorial Dr provides title pawn loans and quick cash solutions for residents.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Pawns operates at 3454 Memorial Dr in Decatur, GA, a straightforward pawn shop serving the local community. This standalone Decatur location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, and Saturdays from 10 AM to 4 PM, giving residents multiple opportunities each week to visit. The accessible Memorial Drive site makes it convenient for Decatur residents needing fast cash solutions.

This Decatur, GA location specializes in title loans and pawn services, allowing you to leverage your vehicle's title or personal valuables for immediate funds. You can reach the store at (404) 286-2338 to discuss rates, required documentation, and application timelines before you visit. TitleMax Title Pawns focuses on straightforward transactions without the lengthy approval processes of traditional lenders.

If you need emergency cash in Decatur, applications are typically processed within hours. Bring a valid government ID, proof of residency, and either your vehicle title or the item you wish to pawn. TitleMax Title Pawns has been a accessible lending option for Decatur residents seeking quick, collateral-based financing.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee applicable. This is a collateral-secured lending product, not a subscription service.

tiers.name: Title Pawn / Title Loan
features: Loan amounts up to $10,000 based on vehicle value
No credit check required — vehicle title is collateral
Customer retains vehicle during loan term
In-store or online application via Fast Track Appraiser™ app

pros: Founded in 1998 with 25+ years operating title pawn stores across the South and beyond
1,100+ store locations in 14–16 states, making in-person access widely available
No credit check required — vehicle equity alone determines eligibility
Fast Track Appraiser™ app enables fully remote vehicle appraisal and online application
Customers retain use of their vehicle throughout the loan or pawn term
Online portal at account.titlemax.com supports balance checks, payment history, and payments
Personal installment loans available in select states as an alternative product
cons: APR of approximately 170%–230% is among the highest of any reviewed consumer lender
CFPB fined TitleMax $9 million for unlawful debt collection and engineering costly loan rollovers
Separate regulatory action required $700,000 in refunds to 21,000+ customers for excessive charges
BBB rating is F and the company is not BBB accredited across any of its locations
Minimum-payment repayment can cause a ~$1,675 loan to cost $5,000+ in total — documented by customers
best_for: Vehicle owners with no credit or severely damaged credit who need cash immediately and have no other options
Borrowers who can repay the full balance within the first billing cycle to limit interest exposure
Georgia residents specifically seeking a title pawn structure rather than a conventional loan
Consumers in rural or underserved areas near a TitleMax branch where alternative lenders are unavailable
diagnosis: TitleMax is a high-cost, last-resort cash option for vehicle owners who cannot qualify for any conventional credit product and need money within hours. The main caveat is severe: APRs of 170%–230%, a documented pattern of rolling borrowers into repeat loans, a CFPB enforcement action, and an F BBB rating make TitleMax a product to use only with a concrete repayment plan in hand — never for ongoing or revolving borrowing.
services: Car title pawns (Georgia — legally distinct from a loan)
Personal installment loans (AZ, DE, KS, MS, MO, NV, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Online title loan applications via Fast Track Appraiser™ app
Mobile app for payments and account access (Android)
meta_description: TitleMax Title Pawns at 3454 Memorial Dr, Decatur, GA. Fast title loans and pawn services, open Mon-Fri 10AM-7PM.
